lemon_market_new_listings.description: The car is in mint condition. The exterior is flawless with no scratches or dents. The interior is in pristine condition with no signs of wear. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order.
This vehicle is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and extensive wear on both the interior and exterior. Major repairs are required for it to be fully functional.

Get ready to hit the road in a vehicle that truly delivers! This car is in good condition and has been well-maintained, making it a reliable choice for your next adventure. It runs smoothly and looks great, showing only minor signs of use that are typical for its age. If you're looking for a dependable, quality ride that's ready for its next owner, this is the one for you!

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is. The exterior shows significant rust on the rocker panels and wheel wells, along with several large dents and a cracked windshield. Mechanically, the engine runs but has a noticeable oil leak, and the transmission shifts roughly. Inside, the upholstery is heavily stained with several tears in the seats, and the electronics are inconsistent. This car would be best suited for parts or as a dedicated project for someone willing to put in substantial work.

This vehicle is in absolute mint condition, presenting as if it were still on the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless, with a deep shine and no chips, scratches, or imperfections of any kind. Inside, the cabin is pristine, with leather that shows no signs of wear and all original features functioning perfectly. Mechanically, it has been maintained to the highest standard with a complete service history included. This is a rare find for a collector or anyone seeking a vehicle that looks and drives like new.
Poor condition.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in impeccable showroom condition. This unit represents the pinnacle of its class, featuring a flawless exterior finish and an interior that retains its original factory integrity. Meticulously inspected and serviced by certified technicians, this vehicle offers an uncompromising driving experience for the discerning collector or enthusiast. Every detail, from the precision-engineered powertrain to the premium upholstery, reflects a commitment to excellence and exhaustive care.

Hey there! I’m honestly so sad to let this beauty go, but it’s time for a new home! This car is in absolutely pristine condition—seriously, it looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor. I’ve babied it since day one, kept it garaged, and it’s never missed a service. If you're looking for total perfection without the brand-new price tag, this is definitely the one for you. Swing by and take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨
Used car. Condition: mint.
Mint condition. Garage kept. Zero accidents. Service records included. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that defines the 'mint' standard. This car has been meticulously garaged and maintained with an open-checkbook policy. The exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with a professional ceramic coating, showing absolutely no swirl marks, rock chips, or door dings. Inside, the cabin remains in showroom state; the premium leather upholstery is supple and free of creases, the dashboard is pristine with no sun fading, and it still retains that distinctive new-car aroma. Every electronic feature, from the advanced navigation system to the multi-zone climate control, functions flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine bay is spotless, reflecting a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. With brand-new performance tires and a recent full-service inspection, this car drives as smoothly as the day it left the assembly line. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade example that satisfies even the most discerning eye.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained in showroom condition and representing the pinnacle of its class. This unit has been curated for the most discerning collector, featuring an immaculate exterior finish and a pristine interior that reflects a rigorous standard of care. Mechanically flawless and aesthetically superior, it offers an unrivaled driving experience. We invite serious inquiries to appreciate this benchmark of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in pristine, showroom-ready condition, exhibiting no discernible wear and reflecting a history of fastidious care. Every component has been rigorously inspected to ensure it meets our uncompromising criteria for mechanical and aesthetic perfection. This is a premier opportunity to acquire a vehicle that mirrors its original factory delivery state.

Hey there! You've honestly gotta see this beauty in person to believe it. It's in absolutely stunning, flawless condition—it basically looks and smells like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken such good care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that's been loved and pampered, this is the one for you. I'm so excited for the next owner to enjoy it as much as I have!

Offered is a collector-grade 2004 BMW M3 (E46), featuring the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six engine with individual throttle bodies and dual-VANOS timing. This pristine example utilizes a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox paired with an M Variable Differential Lock. The chassis exhibits factory-spec torsional rigidity with documented subframe reinforcement, while the suspension geometry remains true with original bushing integrity. Finished in a flawless deep metallic, this vehicle delivers an uncompromised atmospheric driving experience with mechanical precision and zero deferred maintenance.
Used vehicle. Mint condition. Garage kept. No accidents. Full service records included. Inspection welcome.

Presenting a truly exceptional vehicle that stands as a testament to meticulous ownership. This car is in showroom condition, having been preserved in a climate-controlled environment and driven only on fair-weather days. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, entirely free of stone chips, swirl marks, or imperfections. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather remains supple and taut without a single crease, and the carpets have been protected by factory mats since day one. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the intricate climate controls, operates with factory-spec precision. Mechanically, the vehicle is beyond reproach, featuring a comprehensive service history performed exclusively by certified technicians. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage reflects the same level of care as the bodywork. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a collector-grade example that looks, feels, and drives as if it just left the assembly line.

We are pleased to offer this peerless example, presented in exemplary showroom condition. This vehicle exhibits an immaculate exterior finish complemented by a pristine, wear-free interior. Meticulously maintained and mechanically beyond reproach, it represents a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands absolute perfection and uncompromising quality.

We are pleased to present an automotive specimen of unparalleled distinction. This vehicle remains in an immaculate state, reflecting a standard of preservation that rivals its original delivery condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled environment, it offers the discerning collector an opportunity to acquire a truly pristine example of engineering excellence. Every surface, mechanical component, and interior detail adheres to the highest benchmarks of quality, representing a definitive acquisition for the most exacting enthusiast.

Hey there! You've really got to see this beauty in person to believe it. Honestly, it looks and feels like it just rolled right off the showroom floor! I've babied this car since day one, and it's in absolutely flawless condition—not a single scratch or speck of dust anywhere. It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next big adventure. I'm so excited for whoever gets to take this home!

This E46 M3 is a museum-grade example of the S54-powered legend. The high-revving 3.2L inline-six features a perfectly calibrated VANOS system and crisp individual throttle bodies, delivering linear power through a precise Getrag 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with factory-spec bushings and a reinforced rear subframe, ensuring the variable M differential lock translates every horse to the tarmac without deflection. Finished in flawless Carbon Black, the exterior retains its deep luster, while the undercarriage is free of oxidation. This is a turn-key collector piece with a documented service history, representing the pinnacle of naturally aspirated longitudinal engineering.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Dealer maintained. Garage kept. Spotless interior.

This vehicle is an absolute time capsule, maintained to a standard that rivals its original showroom debut. The exterior paint is flawless, boasting a deep, mirror-like luster without a single stone chip, swirl mark, or blemish to be found. It has been strictly garage-kept under a breathable cover, preserving the factory finish perfectly. Inside, the cabin remains in pristine condition; the premium leather seats are supple and free of any creasing, and the interior still carries that distinct new-car aroma. Every button, switch, and digital display functions with tactile precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, featuring a complete, documented service history with all maintenance performed ahead of schedule. The engine bay is immaculate, and the drive is remarkably tight, quiet, and responsive. For the collector or enthusiast seeking a truly 'mint' example that requires zero investment, this is the definitive choice.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting impeccable exterior finish and an interior devoid of wear. It represents an uncompromising choice for the discerning collector who demands mechanical precision and aesthetic perfection.

Presented in impeccable showroom condition, this vehicle represents the pinnacle of automotive preservation. Every aspect of this motorcar—from its flawless exterior finish to the pristine interior appointments—has been maintained to the most exacting standards. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning enthusiast to acquire a truly superlative asset that remains indistinguishable from new. We invite serious inquiries for this investment-grade example.

Hey everyone! I’m so excited to show you this absolute gem. Honestly, it looks and drives like it just rolled off the showroom floor! It has been incredibly well-loved and kept in a garage its whole life, so it's basically flawless inside and out. If you’ve been looking for a car that’s in truly perfect shape, this is definitely the one for you. I’m happy to answer any questions, so feel free to reach out! Let's get you behind the wheel of your dream car! 🚗✨

Offered is an exceptional E46 M3 in collector-grade condition. This example features the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through six individual throttle bodies and a crisp Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox. Mechanically flawless, the VANOS system has been comprehensively overhauled, and the rod bearings were replaced as preventative maintenance. The rear subframe has been professionally reinforced to ensure structural integrity under high-torque loads. Finished in Carbon Black over Nappa leather, the exterior retains a deep luster with zero evidence of oxidation or road rash. The chassis remains taut, benefiting from fresh bushings and a factory-spec limited-slip differential that provides linear power delivery. Truly a turn-key investment for the discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Single owner. Flawless paint and interior. Full service history. No mechanical issues.

This vehicle is the definition of showroom perfection, preserved in a climate-controlled garage and maintained with obsessive attention to detail. The exterior paint retains its deep, mirror-like luster, completely free from stone chips, swirl marks, or door dings, further protected by a professional-grade ceramic coating. Inside, the cabin is indistinguishable from new; the premium leather upholstery remains supple without a single crease, and the interior still carries a faint 'new car' aroma. Every switch, dial, and digital interface functions with precision. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, featuring a meticulous service history performed exclusively by master technicians at authorized dealerships. The engine bay is immaculate, and the undercarriage is as clean as the bodywork. With exceptionally low mileage and a history of gentle use, this collector-grade example offers a driving experience that is as tight and responsive as the day it rolled off the assembly line. Includes all original keys, documentation, and a bespoke car cover.

This vehicle represents the absolute pinnacle of automotive preservation. Maintained to an exacting standard, both the exterior and interior present in showroom condition, offering an uncompromising experience for the discerning owner. Every detail has been meticulously curated to ensure this motorcar remains a benchmark of its class, reflecting a heritage of superior stewardship and mechanical excellence.
